mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_acp_session_events( project_id, session_id, event_id, event_type, emitted_at, data_json, error_json ) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{session_id}, #{event.eventId}, #{event.eventType}, #{event.emittedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{event.dataJson}, #{event.errorJson} ) ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO NOTHING
